2603.26046.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation Based Nurse Observation Extraction
2603.26046.paper_summary: Recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) have played a significant role in reducing human workload across various domains, a trend that is increasingly extending into the medical field. In this paper, we propose an automated pipeline designed to alleviate the burden on nurses by automatically extracting clinical observations from nurse dictations. To ensure accurate extraction, we introduce a method based on Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). Our approach demonstrates effective performance, achieving an F1-score of 0.796 on the MEDIQA-SYNUR test dataset.
2603.26046.paper_summary_zh: 最近在大型語言模型（LLMs）方面的進展在減輕各個領域的人類工作負擔方面發揮了重要作用，這一趨勢正日益擴展到醫療領域。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了一個自動化流程，旨在通過自動提取護理人員的口述臨床觀察來減輕護理人員的負擔。<lb/>為了確保準確提取，我們引入了一種基於檢索增強生成（RAG）的方法。<lb/>我們的方法顯示出有效的性能，在MEDIQA-SYNUR測試數據集上達到了0.796的F1分數。
2603.26046.author: Kyomin Hwang et.al.
